name: Ferrellgas
notes: Strategy: Parsed ferrellgas.com/sitemap.xml. URL pattern is /propane-locations/{state}/{city}/{street-slug}/{location-id}/. Extracted city/state/street from each URL. Street slug reverse-engineered to human-readable form. Company claims ~1,000 distribution locations across all 50 states per 10-K filings; this scrape captured ~520 unique branch URLs from the public sitemap (sitemap appears partial for several states including WI, WV, WY, MA, NJ, HI, AK which were not fully indexed or returned truncated/unreliable data). City-level geography only - no street numbers, zip codes, phones, or lat/lng available without fetching each individual page. Source: https://www.ferrellgas.com/sitemap.xml
